channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned van, 18th March
item.description:
This van been here for about 6 months. Parking in our road is an issue , never enough spaces for the residents. This needs to go .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdowne Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned garden waste, 18th March
item.description:
Garden waste abandoned here and the other half across the street. There is also random cushion & materials dumped here. Please install CCTV. Reoccurring problem.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alconbury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter along Queens Drive, 18th March
item.description:
Litter along Queens Drive on West side from Somerfield Road southwards. This has been unswept for over a week. The road is meant to be swept twice a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extreme litter, 18th March
item.description:
There is litter all the way along the high street, left there by businesses. There does not seem to be a commercial waste collection here and if there is it isn’t enough.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extreme litter, 18th March
item.description:
There is extreme litter all along the bank of Plumstead station causing potential issues to wildlife and humans.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Setee and 2 chairs dumped in Woodstock Crescent N9, 18th March
item.description:
Dumped setee and chairs blocking the pavement in Woodstock Crescent opposte No.102
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayfield Crescent, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside selco, 18th March
item.description:
Outside selco on Woolwich rd se7 left all over the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolwich Road, Charlton Riverside, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside selco, 18th March
item.description:
Outside selco on the pavement of Woolwich rd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolwich Road, Charlton Riverside, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Peartree Wy, London SE10 0QJ, 18th March
item.description:
By the Sainsbury's petrol station in Greenwich (next to IKEA) been there for weeks all over the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Commercial Way, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning please!, 18th March
item.description:
So all mud and lots of pigeon feces all over floor and wall which is also turnings into weeds and moss and needs sweeping cleaning and removing please. This also needs monitoring

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seven Stiles Court, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old furniture dumped on the footpath, 18th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ryecroft Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter from green warehouse on Belfast Road N16 6UH, 18th March
item.description:
Yet again the warehouse has deposited rubbish on the street and pavement, underneath cars etc including paper towels, plastic , cardboard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Belfast Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light outside number 12 Palace Road still not working, this has been going for weeks., 18th March
item.description:
Finding it very worrying and insecure
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Palace Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sign damaged. -, 18th March
item.description:
The road on the corner of Pembroke Road is loose.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembroke Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 18th March
item.description:
Car - CV58 NVY - has been parked on Edmund Road for a few weeks. It appears to be abandoned.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edmund Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights takes forever at night to change, 18th March
item.description:
Traffic late at night never changes takes too long it should be light sensor at night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 189, Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Too many pot holes and uneven high hill, 18th March
item.description:
Too many uneven pot holes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Too many rats from street being dirty, 18th March
item.description:
Need street washed or something needs a deep clean too many rats around effecting businesses
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Need more lights as shops get broken into, 18th March
item.description:
Need more lights
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch pothole diameter 3 inc deep, 18th March
item.description:
Been there at least before dec 25 It is on parked car side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55;57, Baird Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
